items.title: GitHub Actions workflow optimization
items.description: Optimize GitHub Actions workflows for speed and reliability: reduce run times, improve caching, parallelize jobs, and optimize resource usage.

items.title: Multi-stage build pipeline
items.description: Implement multi-stage build pipeline: lint/test → build → security scan → integration test → performance test → release staging.

items.title: Automated security scanning
items.description: Integrate security scanning into CI pipeline: static analysis (Bandit, SAST), dependency scanning (CVE checks), container scanning, secret detection.

items.title: Container image optimization
items.description: Optimize container images: multi-stage builds, minimal base images, layer caching, dependency reduction, and image size analysis.

items.title: Test parallelization
items.description: Enable test parallelization to reduce CI pipeline execution time: run tests in parallel with dependency tracking, test distribution, and failure isolation.

items.title: Build caching strategy
items.description: Implement build artifact caching strategy: cache dependencies, compiled artifacts, and build outputs to speed up builds and reduce resource usage.

items.title: PR preview environments
items.description: Automatically create preview environments for each PR: deploy PR changes to ephemeral environment, enable testing and review, tear down after merge.

items.title: Automated release notes
items.description: Automatically generate release notes from commit history, PR titles, and conventional commits. Categorize changes (features, fixes, breaking changes) and generate formatted release notes.

items.title: Branch protection rules
items.description: Enforce branch protection rules: require status checks to pass before merge, require PR reviews, dismiss stale reviews, require code owner reviews, auto-delete branches.

items.title: Pipeline failure notifications
items.description: Notify developers of pipeline failures with actionable information: which stage failed, why, how to fix, and who should be notified.

items.title: Blue/green deployment strategy
items.description: Implement blue/green deployment strategy allowing zero-downtime releases. Maintain two production environments, switch traffic between them, and enable rapid rollback.

items.title: Canary release automation
items.description: Implement canary release process: gradually roll out to a small percentage of traffic, monitor metrics, and expand rollout if health checks pass.

items.title: Feature flag system
items.description: Build feature flag system enabling feature toggles without code redeploy. Support percentage-based rollouts, user targeting, and A/B testing.

items.title: Deployment verification tests
items.description: Implement comprehensive post-deployment verification tests: health checks, smoke tests, integration tests, and performance benchmarks to validate successful deployment.

items.title: Automated rollback triggers
items.description: Implement automatic rollback triggers based on predefined conditions: deployment verification test failure, error rate spike, latency degradation, health check failure, or SLA violation.

items.title: Multi-environment management
items.description: Manage multiple deployment environments (dev, staging, production) with environment-specific configuration, secrets, and deployment strategies.

items.title: Configuration management
items.description: Centralized configuration management system supporting multiple formats (YAML, JSON, environment variables) with validation, versioning, and change tracking.

items.title: Secrets rotation automation
items.description: Implement automated secrets rotation: API keys, database passwords, certificates, and other credentials. Rotate on schedule and on-demand with zero-downtime.

items.title: Zero-downtime deployment
items.description: Guarantee zero-downtime deployments through load balancer health checks, graceful shutdown, connection draining, and coordinated instance recycling.

items.title: Deployment analytics
items.description: Track and analyze deployment metrics: deployment frequency, lead time for changes, mean time to recovery, and change failure rate. Enable data-driven deployment decisions.

items.title: System health dashboard
items.description: Build a central health dashboard that displays real-time status of all system components: executor availability, item completion rate, failure frequency, resource usage, and operational health indicators.

items.title: Real-time metrics visualization
items.description: Create time-series visualization of system metrics: execution rate, subtask completion time, error frequency, resource consumption, and performance trends. Support multiple visualization types (line graphs, histograms, heatmaps).

items.title: Alert configuration system
items.description: Build configurable alert system with thresholds for failure rate, response time, resource usage, and custom metrics. Support multiple notification channels (email, Slack, webhook, SMS).

items.title: SLA tracking and reporting
items.description: Track and report on Service Level Agreement (SLA) compliance metrics: availability targets, response time SLAs, error rate SLAs, and item completion SLAs. Generate periodic compliance reports.

items.title: Uptime monitoring
items.description: Monitor system availability with continuous health checks. Track uptime percentage, detect outages, measure recovery time, and maintain historical uptime records.

items.title: Resource utilization tracking
items.description: Monitor CPU, memory, disk, and network usage. Track resource consumption trends, detect resource exhaustion conditions, and forecast capacity requirements.

items.title: Anomaly detection
items.description: Implement statistical anomaly detection for system metrics. Detect unusual patterns in execution time, error rates, resource usage, and completion rates. Alert on detected anomalies.

items.title: Custom metric collectors
items.description: Build extensible framework for custom metric collectors. Enable domain-specific metrics (item completion rate, subtask success rate, model usage, etc.) without core changes.

items.title: Historical data analysis
items.description: Build tools for analyzing historical monitoring data. Support queries, aggregations, and pattern discovery over archived metrics. Enable root cause analysis and trend investigation.

items.title: Performance baseline tracking
items.description: Establish and track performance baselines for key metrics: execution speed, memory usage, error rates, and completion rates. Compare current performance against baselines to identify regressions.
